## Checklist
- [ ] Every commit is signed off (`git commit -s`) — the DCO check enforces this
- [ ] New source files carry the SPDX header (`node scripts/add-copyright-headers.mjs --check`)
- [ ] CI is green (typecheck + unit suite)
